user_claim: Customer: I received a package that looks water damaged. | Support: Was the item inside wet too? | Customer: I have not opened everything yet, but the outside has a wet-looking stain. | Support: So the claim is about the package condition? | Customer: Yes, the package surface looked damaged when it arrived.
evidence_standard_met_reason: The image clearly shows a water stain on the side of the package, which matches the user's claim of water damage to the package exterior.
claim_status_justification: The image img_1 clearly shows a water stain on the side of the package, which directly supports the customer's claim of water damage. Despite the user_history_risk flag, the visual evidence provided is consistent with the reported issue.
